# Henry Chen — Personal Website

> Fullstack developer & DevOps engineer based in Sydney, Australia. Computer Science graduate who combines software development with photography.

## About

Henry Chen is a fullstack developer and DevOps engineer specializing in building efficient, scalable solutions. He works with TypeScript, React, Next.js, Python, Rust, C#/.NET, Docker, and AWS. Beyond code, he captures urban landscapes and natural beauty across Australia through photography.

## Site Sections

- [Home](https://misoto22.com): Landing page with featured projects, photography, and blog posts
- [Projects](https://misoto22.com/projects): Portfolio of software projects with live demos and source code
- [Photography](https://misoto22.com/photography): Photo gallery with EXIF metadata
- [Blog](https://misoto22.com/blog): Technical articles on web development, DevOps, and photography
- [Experience](https://misoto22.com/experience): Professional work history
- [Education](https://misoto22.com/education): Academic background
- [Contact](https://misoto22.com/contact): Contact form and social links

## Contact
